problem_statement.fact: Fixed top-20 generation is structurally valid for all five backend-candidate-generation rows, but three rows still have no valid candidate after evaluation-only label join.
problem_statement.agent_inference: The remaining blocker is backend recall or source-pool validity, not goal-validity arbitration. Testing goal-validity confirmation on these rows would confound no-valid pool failure with repeated-instance reasoning.
problem_statement.paper_constraint: This contract is a diagnostic backend recall repair contract. It uses evaluation-only no-valid reporting to choose a repair probe and must not be described as an action-time policy or paper utility claim.

deeper_generation_policy.long_running_job_policy: If scene export, VLMaps map generation, dense candidate export, decompression, or indexing is needed, launch as a tmux/nohup/background job with timestamped logs under the H001 runtime logs directory.

allowed_action_inputs: fixed top-20 generation action rows with candidate_generation_status == generated_fixed_top20_pool
episode_key, scene_key, query, expanded_retrieval_request_id, and target_scene_query_key
source action evidence candidate ids, semantic rank, semantic score, support score, positive support, position, visit_position, reachability, and lineage fields
existing non-GT VLMaps feature maps, text embeddings, map alignment, spatial NMS or component export settings
Habitat navmesh and reachability or standoff feasibility computed without target labels
duplicate, finite-position, spatial-diversity, and backend-config metadata
forbidden_action_inputs: choosing candidate ids, top-k, NMS distance, percentile, or backend family after inspecting candidate correctness within the deeper generated pool
terminal commit or goal switch based on this diagnostic output

candidate_generation_accounting: report target request rows and target scene/query pairs separately
report fixed top-20 candidate ids and deeper generated candidate ids
report retained-from-top20, new-beyond-top20, duplicate, finite-position, reachable/standoff, unknown-reachability, and positive-support counts
report candidate backend variant, percentile, max_candidates, NMS distance or component settings, deterministic sort key, source map path, and query embedding path
evaluation_only_reporting: write action-time deeper generation rows before joining labels
join evaluation labels only after generation rows are written
report recovered-valid rows, still-no-valid rows, first recovered candidate rank, and recovery rate by variant
do not use evaluation labels to change candidate generation parameters within this contract
failure_accounting: report duplicate-heavy or nonfinite candidate pool
report no new candidates beyond top-20
report still no-valid after deeper generation
report when source-pool validity remains non-separable by action-time proxy

expected_next_analyzer_or_job.name: expanded_retrieval_deeper_backend_generation_v1
expected_next_analyzer_or_job.role: generate deeper non-GT backend candidate pools for the three diagnostic no-valid fixed top-20 rows and report whether any rows become eligible for later goal-validity confirmation
expected_next_analyzer_or_job.input_scope: three rows from h001_expanded_retrieval_backend_candidate_generation_v1 with evaluation-only no-valid fixed top-20 pools; action-time source rows remain label-free
expected_next_analyzer_or_job.target_scene_query_scope: two scene/query pairs: QaLdnwvtxbs::bed and bxsVRursffK::bed

promotion_rules.contract_only: Freezing this contract permits a diagnostic deeper backend generation implementation, not terminal ObjectNav commitment.
promotion_rules.goal_validity_confirmation_unblocked: Goal-validity confirmation can be defined only for rows that recover at least one candidate after generation rows are written and labels are joined for analysis, or for rows isolated by a later non-GT pool-validity proxy.
promotion_rules.non_gt_proxy_required_for_paper_method: Because this contract uses evaluation-only no-valid reporting to choose diagnostic target rows, any paper-facing policy must later replace that selection with a non-GT pool-validity proxy or evaluate deeper generation on all predeclared backend-generation rows.
promotion_rules.paper_claim_blocked: No policy-scale, first_eval rerun, or terminal ObjectNav claim is allowed from this contract alone.

next_steps: Implement a small analyzer/job that builds target scene/query specs from this contract.
Reuse existing scene export and VLMaps map artifacts if available; otherwise launch a long-running background job under the AGENTS.md policy.
Generate fixed deeper candidate pools with the first variant before any label join.
Join labels only after deeper generation rows exist and report recovered-valid versus still-no-valid rows.
Define goal-validity confirmation only for recovered rows or define a non-GT pool-validity proxy if no-valid rows remain mixed with valid rows.
